name: Marinated Lemon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Feta cheese, cut into 8 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the chicken breasts and coat them well with the oil, ensuring they are evenly coated on all sides.
3. Spread the crushed garlic evenly on both sides of each chicken breast.
4. Pour the lemon juice over the chicken, then sprinkle the chopped oregano and white pepper on top.
5. Cover the pan and refrigerate for 24 hours to allow the chicken to marinate.
6. Preheat a grill or charbroil burner to medium-high heat.
7. Place the marinated chicken breasts on the hot surface and cook for 5 to 6 minutes on each side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
8. Brush the chicken with the marinade during cooking to keep it moist.
9. Remove the chicken from the heat and transfer it to a large serving platter.
10. Place a piece of feta cheese on top of each chicken breast before serving.
